mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lawyer (user_id, license_no, law_firm, bio, status, practice_years, rating, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{licenseNo}, #{lawFirm}, #{bio}, #{status}, #{practiceYears}, 0.0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT l.lawyer_id, l.user_id, l.license_no, l.law_firm, l.bio, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.create_time, u.username, u.avatar_url, GROUP_CONCAT(s.name) AS specialties FROM lawyer l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id GROUP BY l.lawyer_id ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT l.lawyer_id, l.user_id, l.license_no, l.law_firm, l.bio, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.create_time, u.username, u.avatar_url, GROUP_CONCAT(s.name) AS specialties FROM lawyer l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id GROUP BY l.lawyer_id ORDER BY l.rating DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT l.lawyer_id, l.user_id, l.license_no, l.law_firm, l.bio, l.practice_years, l.rating, l.status, l.create_time, u.username, u.avatar_url, GROUP_CONCAT(s.name) AS specialties FROM lawyer l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN lawyer_specialty ls ON l.lawyer_id = ls.lawyer_id LEFT JOIN specialty s ON ls.specialty_id = s.specialty_id WHERE s.name = #{specialty} GROUP BY l.lawyer_id ORDER BY l.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE lawyer SET license_no = #{licenseNo}, law_firm = #{lawFirm}, practice_years = #{practiceYears}, bio = #{bio}, status = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
